lineage.title: Lineage
lineage.subtitle: Every recorded request derivation graph. Pick a request to trace its prompt, retrievals, tool calls and outputs.
lineage.errorTitle: Could not load recent lineage from the gateway.
lineage.emptyTitle: No requests recorded yet. Send a prompt through the gateway and refresh.
lineage.detailEmptyTitle: No lineage recorded for this request.
lineage.detailEmptyBody: Once the gateway records prompts, retrievals or tool calls for this request_id, they will appear here as a DAG.
lineage.detailErrorTitle: Could not load lineage for this request.
lineage.keyboardHint: Use ↑ ↓ ← → to move between nodes, Enter to open detail.
detok.title: Detokenise placeholder
detok.subtitle: Reveals the original value behind a vault token. Audited and notified to SecOps.
detok.justificationHelp: Why is this reveal necessary? Minimum 16 characters. Recorded verbatim.
detok.ticketHelp: Required. Links this reveal to an open incident, e.g. JIRA SEC-2024-118.
detok.confirmCheckbox: I understand this action is logged and notifies SecOps.
detok.notFound: Placeholder not found in vault. Token may have expired or belongs to another request.
detok.error: Detokenise request failed. Check the audit log.
detok.rateLimited: Tenant detokenise rate limit exceeded. Retry in {seconds} seconds.
detok.rateLimitedBody: Detokenise requests for this tenant are capped to protect operator workflows from misuse. Retry once the cooldown expires.
vectors.title: Vector stores
vectors.subtitle: Embedding-time DLP and retrieval-time ACL across every configured vector store.
vectors.empty: No vector stores configured. Add a connector under Settings.
readiness.title: 1.0 readiness
